nasb.text: Philip answered Him, “Two hundred denarii worth of bread is not sufficient for them, for everyone to receive a little.”

esv.text: Philip answered him, “Two hundred denarii worth of bread would not be enough for each of them to get a little.”

cnv.text: 腓力回答：“就算二百銀幣買的餅，每人分一點，也是不夠的。”

ccb.text: 腓力回答说：“就算买二百个银币的饼，也不够他们每人一口啊！”

csbs.text: 腓力回答：“就是两百个银币的饼，也不够每个人吃一小块！”
